overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed open world game showing a character in a cowboy hat walking along a dirt path through rural countryside. The scene features overcast skies, scattered trees, and transitions from rocky terrain to railway tracks, eventually approaching wildlife near the tracks.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt path through open prairie with rocky hillside

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path through open countryside with rocky terrain on the right

entered.detail: muddy dirt trail winding through the prairie
steep rocky embankment covered with sparse grass and shrubs
solitary oak trees dotting the landscape
tall grass fields extending to the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt path through open prairie land. A rocky hillside rises on the right while scattered oak trees and grassland stretch out to the left under an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt path running parallel to railway embankment

events.description: railway tracks become visible on the left side of the path, replacing the rocky hillside

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path with railway tracks now running parallel on the left

entered.detail: steel railway tracks running parallel to the dirt path
raised gravel bed supporting the railway line

segments.scene_description: The rocky hillside falls away as railway tracks come into view on the left, running parallel to the path. The character continues walking through the open prairie with scattered trees now visible on the right.

events.description: deer become visible standing near the railway tracks ahead

agents.ego_description: approaching a group of deer standing near the railway tracks

notable_agents.action: deer standing near the railway tracks, appearing alert and stationary

entered.detail: group of deer standing beside the railway tracks
discarded wooden barrels and crates near the tracks

segments.scene_description: As the character continues along the path, the railway tracks draw closer on the left. A group of deer becomes visible standing near the tracks alongside some wooden debris, while a large oak tree approaches on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an open prairie that shifts from a rocky hillside landscape to a railway corridor. It begins with the character walking along a dirt path, flanked by a rising rocky hillside on the right and scattered oak trees under an overcast sky. As the character progresses, the hillside falls away and the scene opens up to reveal railway tracks running parallel to the path on the left. The camera then follows the character as the tracks draw closer, passing wooden debris and a group of deer standing by the rails before approaching a large oak tree on the right.
